description: Geographic hierarchy with surrogate key for efficient joins

DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE (
	IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT,
	TIME_ID BIGINT,
	BCG_VACCINE DOUBLE PRECISION,
	OPV_0_BIRTH_DOSE DOUBLE PRECISION,
	OPV_1 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	OPV_2 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	OPV_3 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	OPV_BOOSTER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PENTAVALENT_1 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PENTAVALENT_2 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PENTAVALENT_3 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FOREIGN KEY (GEOGRAPHY_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY (GEOGRAPHY_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (TIME_ID) REFERENCES DIM_TIME (TIME_ID)
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED (
	IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT,
	TIME_ID BIGINT,
	ROTAVIRUS_1 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	ROTAVIRUS_2 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	ROTAVIRUS_3 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	IPV_1 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	IPV_2 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MEASLES_RUBELLA_MCV_1ST_DOSE_9_11_MONTHS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MR_2ND_DOSE_16_24_MONTHS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FOREIGN KEY (GEOGRAPHY_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY (GEOGRAPHY_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (TIME_ID) REFERENCES DIM_TIME (TIME_ID)
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_COVERAGE CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_COVERAGE (
	IMMUNIZATION_COVERAGE_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT,
	TIME_ID BIGINT,
	FEMALE_FULLY_IMMUNIZED_CHILDREN_9_11_MONTHS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MALE_FULLY_IMMUNIZED_CHILDREN_9_11_MONTHS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	DPT_1ST_BOOSTER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_5_YEARS_DPT_5_2ND_BOOSTER INTEGER,
	CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 INTEGER,
	CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16 INTEGER,
	FOREIGN KEY (GEOGRAPHY_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY (GEOGRAPHY_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (TIME_ID) REFERENCES DIM_TIME (TIME_ID)
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING (
	MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT,
	TIME_ID BIGINT,
	PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC DOUBLE PRECISION,
	ANC_REGISTERED_WITHIN_1ST_TRIMESTER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PREGNANCY_WOMEN_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PREGNANCY_WOMEN_TESTED_HB_4_OR_MORE_TIMES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PREGNANCY_WOMEN_HB_LEVEL_LESS_11 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_HB_TESTS_CONDUCTED DOUBLE PRECISION,
	NUMBER_OF_PREGNANCY_TEST_KITS_USED DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FOREIGN KEY (GEOGRAPHY_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY (GEOGRAPHY_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (TIME_ID) REFERENCES DIM_TIME (TIME_ID)
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_MATERNAL_TREATMENT_SUPPLEMENTS CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_MATERNAL_TREATMENT_SUPPLEMENTS (
	MATERNAL_TREATMENT_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT,
	TIME_ID BIGINT,
	PREGNANCY_WOMEN_TT1_TD1 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PREGNANCY_WOMEN_TT2_TD2 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PREGNANCY_WOMEN_TT_BOOSTER_TD_BOOSTER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PREGNANCY_WOMEN_ALBENDAZOLE_TABLET_AFTER_1ST_TRIMESTER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PREGNANCY_WOMEN_PROVIDED_FULL_COURSE_180_IFA_TABLETS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PREGNANCY_WOMEN_PROVIDED_FULL_COURSE_360_CALCIUM_TABLETS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MOTHERS_PROVIDED_FULL_COURSE_180_IFA_TABLETS_AFTER_DELIVERY DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FOREIGN KEY (GEOGRAPHY_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY (GEOGRAPHY_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (TIME_ID) REFERENCES DIM_TIME (TIME_ID)
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT (
	PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT,
	TIME_ID BIGINT,
	IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_PLANNED DOUBLE PRECISION,
	IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_HELD DOUBLE PRECISION,
	IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_WITH_ASHA_PRESENT DOUBLE PRECISION,
	COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED DOUBLE PRECISION,
	CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FOREIGN KEY (GEOGRAPHY_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY (GEOGRAPHY_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (TIME_ID) REFERENCES DIM_TIME (TIME_ID)
);
